holdings.infoBox: WATS is an equity ETF with a total of 25 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tesla stock at 16.41%, Bloom Energy at 8.77%, Enphase Energy at 6.96%, Fluence Energy at 6.56%, and SolarEdge Technologies at 6.42%.

overview.description: The Corgi Battery Energy Storage Systems ETF (WATS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund invests in companies across the battery storage value chain. The actively managed ETF targets companies from around the world involved in the design, manufacturing, integration, deployment, and operation of battery energy storage systems. WATS was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
